---
pagetitle: "John Baker – Learning Analytics & AI"
title: "Deep Learning & Transformer Models"
listing: 
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
title-block-banner: true
page-navigation: true
back-to-top-navigation: false
---
